[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00000000 a
1 00000000 a
2 10011011 5
3 00000001 1
4 01001000 2
5 00000001 1
6 00000000 a
7 00110000 2

01 10 10010000 2
12 21 00000011 2
23 32 00000011 2
34 43 11001001 4
45 54 01001000 2 match 4
56 65 00000000 a match 0 1 6
67 76 00100001 2
70 07 10100000 2

02 20 00000000 a match 0 1 6
13 31 10011011 5 match 2
24 42 00000001 1 match 3 5
35 53 01001000 2 match 4
46 64 00000001 1 match 3 5
57 75 00000000 a match 0 1 6
60 06 00110000 2 match 7
71 17 10000011 3

03 30 10110000 3
14 41 10001001 3
25 52 00000000 a match 0 1 6
36 63 00110001 3
47 74 10000001 2
50 05 00000000 a match 0 1 6
61 16 00010001 2
72 27 00000011 2

04 40 10000000 1
15 51 00001100 2
26 62 00000001 1 match 3 5
37 73 10100011 4
[completion]
